Text: The gate creaks behind you. You are inside now.|The town does not look abandoned from here.|It looks like it has been waiting.
You step through into {roomName} and take a moment to let your eyes adjust.
You are back in {roomName}.
There is nothing that way. The wall has no intention of becoming a door.
You look around carefully. The room offers nothing new.
You take the {itemName} and add it to your inventory.
You reach for the {itemName} but your hands are already full. Drop something first.
You cannot use that item right now.
The {effectName} fades. You feel marginally more like yourself.
Something in this town wants you gone.|It has decided to be direct about it.
You square up against {monsterName}.
The {monsterName} falls. The room exhales.
The Poltergeist FLEES through the {direction} exit and barricades it shut!
The puzzle crumbles. You lose 5 HP.
--- YOU HAVE FALLEN ---
Your vision blurs. The cold seeps into your bones.
The puzzle's punishment tears through you.
You press the brass key into the rusted lock of the front gate.
The tumblers grind. The gate swings open with a groan.
Cold air rushes in from outside. Real air. Living air.
You step through. You do not look back.
--- YOU ESCAPED ---
The last of them falls.
The wailing stops. The shadows recede. The cold lifts from the air.
Something ancient and wrong has been driven out of this town.
--- CLEANSE ENDING ---
Leave the town? Your progress will be lost if you have not saved.
